subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath made a pillar of justice! In this world, millions of pillars have been raised up, but since their foundation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من جعله الله عمادا للعدل در این عالم کرورها عمادها برپا شد ولی چون پایه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @stories; anecdotes, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
